geopolitics_summary: Strait of Hormuz crisis intensifies NATO discussions; EU growth forecasts cut on Middle East war and energy price inflation; UK eases Russia sanctions amid EU complaint.

themes.headline: Strait of Hormuz crisis drives EU energy security concerns amid geopolitical tension
themes.why_it_matters: Hormuz disruption risk threatens LNG supply routes to Europe. If passage closes, EU faces forced gas substitution into power and industrial sectors, lifting TTF and power forward curves; direct markup on risk premium.

themes.headline: EU growth forecasts slashed; Middle East war and energy prices lift inflation outlook
themes.why_it_matters: Commission signals sustained elevated energy prices from geopolitical stress. Stagflation scenario strengthens case for higher power and gas baseloads; reduces industrial demand destruction hedge, supporting Cal+1 curve.

themes.headline: UK rolls back Russia sanctions on jet fuel and diesel; EU protests timing
themes.why_it_matters: UK sanction relaxation may ease global crude markets, reducing overall energy scarcity premium. Indirect: lower crude supports fuel-switching away from gas into power generation in Europe, bearish TTF and power spreads.

themes.headline: Italy's Meloni pushes nuclear revival after 40 years of political taboo
themes.why_it_matters: If Italy successfully deploys nuclear capacity by 2030s, it reduces Southern EU power supply tightness and shifts merit order downward. Long-dated structural bearish for regional power prices; near-term political hurdle.

themes.headline: COP31 consensus: global shift to electrification amid oil and gas supply volatility fears
themes.why_it_matters: Policy momentum for electrification increases structural demand for EU power and renewables infrastructure investment. Medium-term support for power curve stability and carbon pricing as coal/gas phase-out accelerates.

watchlist: NATO Friday meeting on Strait of Hormuz; monitor escalation risk to LNG flow disruption.
UK sanction exemption scope and duration clarification; potential crude/product market spillover.
Italian nuclear policy roadmap and parliamentary timetable; long-dated power supply signal.
EU industrial demand data (May–June) for fuel-switching impact under elevated energy prices.
